complex-identity.summary: Complex algebra with A=0: encode angles as real-ratio constraints, derive circumcenter identity

dot-product-identity.summary: Direct dot product: reduce OM=ON to 4(b-c)·O_0 = |b|²-|c|², derive from angle conditions

power-balance.summary: Power of a point + sine rule: prove pow(M) = pow(N) via lever identity AB·MP_B = AC·NP_N

sigma-symmetry.summary: B<->C symmetry (sigma): trivial for isoceles, extend to general via algebraic identity principle
